name: Chili"con-caucasian" (White Chili)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast, skinned, boned, diced
1 can tomatillos (18oz), drained and coarsely chopped
1 can Rotel Tomatoes, chopped but not drained
1 can chopped green chile peppers, not drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with Pam and add olive oil. Heat on medium high until hot.
2. Add diced chicken and saute for 3 minutes or until done. Remove chicken from the pan and set aside.
3. Add shallots and garlic to the pan and saute until tender.
4. Stir in tomatillos, Rotel tomatoes, chicken broth, chili peppers, and spices. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Return the cooked chicken to the pan and add beans. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Stir in lime juice and black pepper. Serve hot in chili bowls topped with cheese. Alternatively, place all ingredients except cheese in a crockpot and cook for 8 hours. Enjoy with tortilla chips, sour cream, avocado dip, and Mexican beer.
